label: Provider Pak
blurb: Healthcare Administration & Medical Billing. Cuts clinical overhead and fights insurance companies.

skills.label: Patient Intake Ocr Mapper
skills.method: Scans messy, handwritten clipboard intake forms and perfectly maps allergies and family history into Epic/Cerner.

skills.label: Prior Authorization Compiler
skills.method: Reads physician's EHR notes, extracts ICD-10 codes, and auto-fills the exact 15-page PDF required by Cigna/Aetna.
trigger_examples: eliminates the \#1 cause of delayed patient care and administrative burnout

skills.label: Telehealth Transcript To Soap
skills.method: Listens to a Zoom telehealth call, formats the conversation into a compliant SOAP (Subjective, Objective, Assessment, Plan) note.
trigger_examples: doctors stop typing while talking to patients

skills.label: Prescription Refill Triage
skills.method: Checks pharmacy refill requests against the patient's last visit date and lab results, approving standard meds or flagging for doctor review.
trigger_examples: saves physicians 1-2 hours of rote clicking daily

skills.label: Physician Schedule Tetris
skills.method: Groups 15-minute follow-ups and 45-minute procedures optimally to prevent doctor downtime while minimizing waiting room delays.

skills.label: Referral Loop Closer
skills.method: Tracks outbound specialist referrals, pings the specialist's office API/email weekly until the consultation notes are received back.
trigger_examples: stops patients from falling through the cracks

skills.label: Claim Denial Appeal Drafter
skills.method: Parses 835 remittance files to find why a claim was denied, cross-references medical guidelines, drafts the appeal letter.
trigger_examples: recovers thousands in lost revenue per doctor per month

skills.label: Hipaa Release Validator
skills.method: Scans incoming requests for medical records, verifies signature matching and expiration dates before authorizing the fax.

skills.label: Clinical Trial Criteria Matcher
skills.method: Scans a hospital's entire patient database against the inclusion/exclusion criteria of a new drug trial.
